title: pisonia subcordata var. rotundata
intro: Pisonia subcordata var. rotundata, also known as the Samoan Pisonia, is a plant species in the family Nyctaginaceae, native to the Pacific Islands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pisonia subcordata var. rotundata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared by making a tea or infusion from its leaves, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
